content.text: Description: Office furniture and supplies - Q1 2026 order
Vendor inquiry from Global Office Supply Inc. (VND-4401) re: Invoice #7892, dated March 18, 2026, for $8,750.00 (IT peripherals and accessories - emergency order). Vendor contact: James Hartley.
Payment was issued March 25 via ACH. Trace: 240198763402. Payment run PR-2026-0325-PM.
Premium Logistics Corp (VND-5502) — freight services invoice #7893, $3,200.00, dated March 20, 2026. Due date March 31. Sandra Mitchell is the vendor contact.
Status is Processing — no ACH trace assigned yet. Scheduled for payment run PR-2026-0410-AM.
Description: Warehousing and distribution - Q1 2026 final
Description: Corporate event printing and branded materials
Trace result for ACH 240198763404: Transaction Status: Posted, Acknowledgment Code: ACK, Settlement Date: March 27, 2026. Payment confirmed cleared.
Clearing confirmation missing — PDF not found on OPS_AP_INV-9 or OPS_AP_TRACE-4. Escalation required per AP queue exception path.
Description: Network infrastructure components - quarterly refresh
Resolution: Payment confirmed cleared. Confirmation sent to vendor 3/30.
Description: Copy paper and printing supplies - monthly order
Resolution: Payment cleared. Vendor confirmed receipt 3/19.
Description: Corporate event catering - Q1 all-hands meeting
Resolution: Cleared. Closing ticket per vendor confirmation.
Description: Office equipment - standing desks and monitors
